blended.narrative: Snowshoe is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,622 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.4" of snow, highs of 58°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
